nasb.text: So Jesus said to them again, “Peace be with you; as the Father has sent Me, I also send you.”

esv.text: Jesus said to them again, “Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I am sending you.”

cnv.text: 耶穌又對他們說：“願你們平安。父怎樣差遣了我，我也怎樣差遣你們。”

ccb.text: 耶稣又说：“愿你们平安！父怎样差遣我，我也照样差遣你们。”

csbs.text: 耶稣又对他们说：“愿你们平安！正如父差派了我，我也要派遣你们。”
